title: cinnamomum johnstonii
intro: Cinnamomum johnstonii, also known as the Johnston's cinnamon, is a species of evergreen tree in the family Lauraceae. The medicinal properties of Cinnamomum johnstonii include its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial agent, which can help to reduce swelling and fight off infections. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to lower blood sugar levels, improve digestion, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Cinnamomum johnstonii can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
